note: Do not instantiate directly; use itasca.interface.element module functions.

methods.name: area
methods.description: (3D only) Get the area of the interface element.

methods.name: extra
methods.description: Get the element extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: group
methods.description: Get the element group name in a given slot.

methods.name: group_remove
methods.signature: interface.element.group_remove(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Remove from the given group from all group slots of the element. One argument of type string, giving the group name, is required. The return value is a bool which is True if the group was removed from any slot, otherwise False.

methods.name: groups
methods.description: Get a dictionary describing which groups this element is part of. The keys of the dictionary are the slot names and the values are the group names.

methods.name: in_group
methods.signature: interface.element.in_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> bool
methods.description: Test if the element is part of a given group. If the optional argument slot is given, only that slot is searched. Otherwise, all group slots are searched.

methods.name: join
methods.description: Get the pointer to the adjacent interface element joined across edge i for 3D (i = 1,2,3) pr node i for 2D (i = 1,2).

methods.name: node
methods.description: Pointer to the node associated with the interface element where i=1,2,3 for 3D and i=1,2 for 2D.

methods.name: normal
methods.signature: interface.element.normal(i: int) -> normal vector or component
methods.description: Get the normal vector for the interface element. Returns a vector, unless an optional component argument i is supplied, in which case it returns the component value.

methods.name: set_extra
methods.description: Set the element extra data in the given slot.

methods.name: set_group
methods.signature: interface.element.set_group(group_name: str or int[, slot: str or int]) -> None
methods.description: Set the element group name in a given slot.

methods.name: valid
methods.description: Returns True if this element is live.

methods.name: vertex
methods.description: Pointer to the vertex associated with the interface element where i=1,2,3 for 3D and i=1,2 for 2D.
